title: calantica sphaerocephala
intro: Calantica sphaerocephala, also known as the spherical calanthe, is a type of flowering plant in the orchid family. This plant is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Calantica sphaerocephala are said to include reducing fever and alleviating respiratory issues, while also exhibiting potential antioxidant and cardio-protective properties. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant's roots and rhizomes are often dried and powdered to be used in various formulations, such as decoctions and capsules.
